rules.statement: Any capability referenced by CORE cognitive roles, LLM resources, workers, workflows, or related AI governance artifacts MUST exist in the canonical capability taxonomy.
Ad hoc, undeclared, or locally invented capability names MUST NOT be introduced into routing, role assignment, resource definition, or governance logic.
Capability names MUST remain model-neutral and provider-neutral. Capabilities MUST describe technical ability, not vendor, model, or implementation identity.
Cognitive roles MAY require one or more capabilities, but every required capability MUST be canonical.
LLM resources and other cognitive execution resources MAY declare one or more provided capabilities, but every provided capability MUST be canonical.
